import React ,{UseState} from 'react' import { useState } from 'react'; import {Card,Button,Row,Col} from 'react-bootstrap'; const Pizza = ({pizza}) => { const[variant,setVarient]=useState('small'); const[quantity,setQuantity]=useState(1); return ( {pizza.name}
Varient
Quantity
 Price : {pizza.prices[0][variant]*quantity}/- Rs ) } export default Pizza
